summary: Iter86 retest — Confirmed fix for HIGH issue from iter85. POST /api/tap/submit now correctly returns `cheated` and `suspicious` fields in SubmitResponse. Full backend suite re-run: 14/14 PASS (was 11/14). All 3 previously failing TapSuspicious tests are GREEN. Frontend smoke on /services → Jeux hub PASS : engagement-leaderboard, share-rank-btn (Partager mon rang #1 / enabled) and 3 leaderboard rows all render. TapChallengePage loads clean; new warning banner testids (tap-cheated-warning, tap-suspicious-warning) are correctly conditional on result.cheated/suspicious.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/tap.py L99-108 : SubmitResponse now declares `cheated: bool` and `suspicious: bool` — matches iter85 FR. Return statement L269-270 passes both values. Clean fix, no side-effects.

TapChallengePage.js L332-343 : ResultView renders both warning banners with proper data-testid. Banner is NOT shown when clean, suspicious-only shown when suspicious=true & cheated=false, cheated banner overrides suspicious when cheated=true (correct precedence).

All regression endpoints still healthy : /quiz/start shuffle, /quiz/admin/overview avg metrics, /tap/admin/overview p95+suspicious counts, /tap/admin/suspicious IP/UA exposure, /engagement/leaderboard/weekly top+me, /engagement/share-card.png 1080×1080 PNG >20KB. No regressions detected.
seed_data_creation: Uses admin /api/tap/admin/reset-user/{uid} + /api/quiz/admin/reset-user/{uid} between tests for deterministic quotas.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter85/86 scope is closed. Run `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://japap-refactor.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest backend/tests/test_iter85_shuffling_virality.py -v -p no:ethereum` (~80s, 14 tests). Note: /games direct URL redirects to /feed — Jeux hub is accessed via /services (the Services sidebar item mounts the games module directly in this build; clicking 'Jeux' in a tab is optional). Triggering the actual tap warning banners in the UI requires a full 10s tap run which is non-deterministic in headless; trust the conditional render (verified via code review + backend /submit response shape).
rca of the issue: Previously fixed. Root cause was SubmitResponse omitting the already-computed cheated/suspicious booleans. Main agent added 2 fields to the Pydantic model and passed them in the return — confirmed by 3/3 TapSuspicious tests now green with exact expected values (25 → both false / 105 → suspicious=true cheated=false / 150 → both true, taps_valid=120, bonus=50).
